geopolitical_factors: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and potential for trade disputes could impact global economic growth and thus S&P 500 demand.
Sanctions and trade disputes can disrupt supply chains and influence commodity prices, indirectly affecting S&P 500 components.
C.key_driver: Resilient industrial demand, supported by potential easing of supply chain pressures and ongoing EV adoption, is driving positive sentiment for the S&P 500.
